articles.title: S-Agent: Spatial Tool-Use Elicits Reasoning for Spatial Intelligence

articles.summary: 提出S-Agent，一种空间工具使用代理范式，用于连续多视图图像和视频的理解与推理。通过公式化空间推理，克服了现有VLM和工具增强代理局限于静态、无状态推理的局限，提升3D空间智能。

articles.title: Holo-World: Unified Camera, Object and Weather Control for Video World Model

articles.summary: 研究第一帧锚定的源到状态设置，统一控制相机、物体运动和天气生成，解决现有视频世界模型中控制孤立、天气依赖源视频的问题，实现更灵活的环境状态变化。

articles.summary: 针对灵巧机器人操作依赖人力和工程的瓶颈，提出ENPIRE框架，使机器人在真实世界中自主改进策略。通过抽象化算法搜索，突破编码代理仅限数字环境的局限，迈向通用物理智能。

articles.summary: 质疑世界动作模型是否必须依赖视频生成，提出仅需图像编辑即可。视频生成存在推理成本高、关注无关细节、长期预测误差等问题，ImageWAM通过图像编辑更高效地桥接世界建模与机器人控制。

articles.title: Learning User Simulators with Turing Rewards

articles.excerpt: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards algorithms like GRPO have emerged as the dominant post-training paradigm for complex reasoning in LLMs, yet commonly suffer from policy entropy collapse during training. articles.summary: 针对GRPO等RLVR算法中策略熵崩溃问题，通过token级梯度分析发现信用分配不匹配，提出STARE：基于惊奇度（surprisal）的token级优势重加权，稳定策略熵，提升复杂推理后训练效果。

articles.title: The Reward Was in Your Data All Along: Correcting Flow Matching with Discriminator-Guided RL
articles.excerpt: Score- and flow-matching models often rely on preference-based reinforcement learning for two purposes: aligning with subjective preferences and, surprisingly, recovering properties such as visual realism and coherent object structure that matching-based training is intended to learn from the data itself. We argue that this reflects a structural mismatch. Matching losses measure ell_2 regression e

articles.title: EfficientRollout: System-Aware Self-Speculative Decoding for RL Rollouts
articles.excerpt: Reinforcement learning (RL) has become a representative post-training paradigm for LLMs, enabling strong reasoning and agentic capabilities. However, rollout generation remains a dominant latency bottleneck because autoregressive sampling decodes responses sequentially and a small number of long-tailed generations often determine completion time. Speculative decoding (SD) offers a natural way to a

articles.title: Physics-IQ Verified

articles.title: REVES: REvision and VErification--Augmented Training for Test-Time Scaling
articles.excerpt: Test-time scaling via sequential revision has emerged as a powerful paradigm for enhancing Large Language Model (LLM) reasoning. While recent work treats this as multi-turn reinforcement learning (RL), conventional approaches optimize over the m
articles.summary: 提出REVES，通过修订与验证增强训练，对齐测试时缩放的多步推理动态。不同于传统多轮RL优化整个序列，REVES针对每步修订进行训练，提升LLM推理的渐进改进能力。

articles.title: PragReST: Self-Reinforcing Counterfactual Reasoning for Pragmatic Language Understanding
articles.excerpt: Natural language understanding often depends on meanings that are implied rather than explicitly stated, requiring pragmatic reasoning. articles.summary: 提出PragReST，自监督框架，通过反事实推理和自我强化机制提升LLM的语用推理能力，使其超越字面解释，理解隐含含义，改善自然语言理解中的语用推断。

articles.title: Your AI Travel Agent Would Book You a Bullfight: An Agentic Benchmark for Implicit Animal Welfare in Frontier AI Models
articles.excerpt: AI agents are moving from advisors to actors, booking travel, planning menus, and running procurement on behalf of users. articles.summary: 引入TAC基准，评估AI代理在实际行动（如旅行预订）中是否隐含违反动物福利。现有基准仅评估文本回答，TAC测试代理在工具使用场景中的福利推理，揭示模型安全差距。
